title: Flickingeria nodosa
taxonomy: Flickingeria nodosa is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which includes the majority of orchid species. This genus, Flickingeria, is a part of the subfamily Epidendroideae, known for its diverse range of epiphytic orchids. Flickingeria nodosa is further grouped under the tribe Dendrobieae, which comprises species commonly found in tropical regions. The classification of Flickingeria nodosa is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic analysis. It is considered a terrestrial orchid, but can also thrive in a variety of environments.
